summary:
PROPHETIC WARNINGS AND BURDENS OF DELIVERY: Brandon discusses the challenges of delivering difficult prophetic messages, drawing parallels to the biblical prophet Nathan confronting King David and the reluctance to pray for Saul. Brandon recounts past experiences warning ministers about impending downfalls due to adultery, noting that a massive church was lost because a pastor failed to heed the warning. Brandon emphasizes that these messages are often unpopular and invite persecution, but stresses the importance of delivering them accurately regardless of public opinion or personal feelings.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND SCANDALS: Brandon shares specific visions concerning prominent public figures and government events. Brandon mentions that Candace is destined for a major government door, potentially a Senate position, while cautioning against getting lost in conspiracy theories regarding Charlie Kirk's death. Furthermore, Brandon predicts a future event akin to another Watergate with JD Vance at the helm, warning that the pressures of power reveal true character. Brandon also foresees a scandal similar to the Monica Lewinsky and Marilyn Monroe situations, urging audiences not to be deceived by physical beauty or polished appearances, drawing a comparison to how the Antichrist will deceive many with an attractive exterior.

INTERNATIONAL UNREST AND GLOBAL REVIVALS: Brandon details observations of global geopolitical and spiritual shifts. Brandon points to current riots in Mexico and a military uprising in Venezuela, which Brandon states will be followed by a massive spiritual revival spreading through South America, Asia, and Africa. Brandon foresees the Cold War intensifying and the strengthening of BRICS nations challenging the United States dollar. Additionally, Brandon predicts major spiritual awakenings and structural splits within the Catholic, Mormon, and Jehovah's Witness churches to correct false doctrines. Brandon also asserts that divine visitation and revival will reach even the most entrenched occultists and members of satanic churches.

END TIMES PLAGUES AND TECHNOLOGICAL CONTROL: Brandon outlines a timeline for future crises, specifically a major plague expected around November or December of 2027, extending into 2028. Brandon explains that this plague will be linked to a genocide related to obesity and medications for high blood pressure and cholesterol. According to Brandon, this health crisis will be used as a catalyst to eliminate physical cash, citing virus transmission risks, and to mandate a digital ID tied to cell phones for all commerce. Brandon also warns of genetic modifications resembling historical eugenics, where DNA will be spliced in labs to create perfect babies, with imperfect ones being aborted.

PRAYER DIRECTIVES AND HEALING DECLARATIONS: Brandon focuses heavily on directing intercession for various global and domestic issues. Brandon calls for protective prayers over President Trump, government officials, and the underground churches in nations like China, Iran, and North Korea. Brandon specifically highlights the persecution in Nigeria, declaring that twelve-foot-tall angels will intervene to stop the slaughter. Further intercession is directed against child trafficking and the individuals on the Epstein list, with Brandon stating that perpetrators will be struck with a painful venereal disease. Brandon concludes with firm declarations of physical healing for the audience, specifically rejecting ailments like Hashimoto's, Hodgkin's disease, Parkinson's, and various thyroid and mental health disorders.

PERSONAL ANECDOTES AND HEALTH PRACTICES: Brandon briefly touches upon personal and family life, mentioning the book In Him by Kenneth E. Hagin. Brandon shares lighthearted stories about family members, including Diana's pregnancy cravings for hot snacks and pickles, and Braden's character. Brandon also discusses personal health routines, noting the benefits of maintaining Vitamin D3 levels and drinking NingXia Red wolfberry juice to combat illnesses contracted in public spaces. Brandon notes a strict personal policy of refusing homemade food sent by mail due to safety concerns and threats.
rawData: [November 16, 2025]-[Praying over war]-[https://youtu.be/Ah32W7YNalk]-[Good morning, family. Thank you for joining us again tonight. We really appreciate it. We're just reading this book, "In Him," by Brother Kenneth E. Hagin. Dad Hagin always had the nuggets. I just go over and over all these books. She got a whole bunch more this week. Well, thank you for joining me today, Diana. Yes, I wanted to go over some things, but I was going to have you see what questions they asked. You can look at it. Do you have any questions? You know, I never really just open it up with questions, but I'll go over some of the things we talked about this last prayer session. I took the time to really pray over what the Lord has been showing me because of the persecution that was brought with it. And the Lord said, "Braden, I told you you were called to say the hard things, and the ones that say they really like you, there'll be times when they turn against you because of what I have you say." And he went over and he was talking about the prophet talking to David. The prophet Nathan went and told David something very hard. But David was loved amongst the people. Everybody loved David. David was the man. But nobody knew what was going on behind closed doors. When the men were out to war, David was at home looking at naked women on the balcony, messing around and doing things. But it wasn't a popular thing. But Nathan pulled David aside privately and said, "This is what the Lord has to say to you." And sometimes, out of what I believe the Lord gives me, are these words of warning, words of affirmation, words of correction that are not always easy to give. But Nathan did it, and it wasn't the easy thing to do because David was popular. David was loved. But nobody knew what was going on behind David's door when no one was looking. And sometimes we can see people. I'm not accusing anybody of anything. I only hear in part, I see in part. And sometimes whenever a voice like mine speaks against somebody that is very pretty with pretty eyes and you say this is what's coming and storms and things like that, people get really ticked off at you because you touch their pets, the things that are important to them. But the Lord is saying, "I have this to say regardless." Then I say, just like Saul, Saul was a bad man, was killing Christians and was wrong, was awful, and the prophet didn't even want to go and pray for him after he went blind. He was scared for his life. But the Lord said, "Go and pray for him and I'll restore his sight." It wasn't an easy thing. But he spoke and said, "This is what God said." But Paul, that was Saul, turned around and was one of the greatest voices of the Bible. And so, you know, it's not always easy. And like I tell you all, I see Candace and I saw all these things. I don't know what she stands for. I do not watch her program. I personally see darkness. But the Lord said that he had a plan for her life. And I want you to speak this in and make it public that I have a plan for her to go before a major door. And I've prayed over what I've told you all immensely. I'm talking more prayer over this than I've prayed over a lot of things because of how heavy the word was and what I had said publicly. And I take this very seriously that I speak and I see and I deliver words accurately and they're not in the flesh. Regardless of how it's liked or how it's disliked, I am not working for you. I'm working for Him and I'm sold out to Him. And it's just like when I went to that pastor before and I said, "Sir, if you don't repent and change, your whole church is going down within a couple months." Not knowing that he was committing adultery on his wife the whole time. He lost everything and the building and the church doesn't even exist now. And it was a $20 million building. $20 million. And it was paid off. He lost the congregation, lost it all. I've given some real dandy words where I thought they were going to egg me on my way out of the building, but I've given them and I was bold. I've done it three times to three ministers, and each one of them has fallen with adultery. Every single one of them. And every single one of them, the Lord said, "I'm warning you to change. I want you to repent and change and come back to my heart." And every one of them was accurate, and I know His voice. So when I warn you about the things I'm warning you about, just pray about it if you don't believe it because I can miss it. We're all human. I'm not trying to justify and say, "Well, Brandon's always right." I'm not always right. I'm just as human as all of you are. But I just keep seeking His face. So if I say the Lord wants to use Candace in the future with maybe a Senate position or something huge in government, then we need to pray for her because that means His hand is on her to do something. Does she stand against the Jews? From what I understand, yes. I don't agree that I stand with the Jews wholeheartedly. I pray for the Jews. I pray for the peace of Jerusalem. Do I stand with the government of Israel all the time? No, I don't. Just like I don't stand with our government, but I still pray for them. Do I like what the Democrats do when Joe Biden's in power or Obama? No. When Obama won the second term, I wept myself to sleep. I'll never forget when Mitt Romney lost and I was sitting there going, "What are we going into for another four years?" When people were rejoicing, going, "Oh, four more years," they were so excited and I was like, "Oh God, our country is coming to an end." But God had His hand on it and brought us through, and we still prayed for him. But even in the midst of me telling you what I saw about Candace, God can turn a Saul into a Paul. Did I say that right? Yes. Sometimes I go, "You got a filter? What is it?" But the Lord showed me what He showed me. But is it the rabbit hole? And I'll say this and close with this because we got to move on. Is the rabbit hole that He said don't keep going down because it will cost you your life? Is it your life of what He's wanting to do or is it physically? Some things are metaphors. Stop looking down the rabbit hole. I have more for you to do. Don't keep going down these conspiracies. Don't keep going down this stuff. I have more for you to do behind another door. It will cost you your future. So, is this a warning of life and death or is this a warning about a career? That's for her to decide. That's not my business. I just deliver the word. But then people go, "Well, are you threatening? What is that saying?" I don't know, folks. I just deliver the word. But I know that the Lord said He had more for her to do according to what the Lord is saying. You know what? He sees the heart of the individual and He sees that there's potential there to do something major for Him and be a mouthpiece for Him. Do I agree with everything she says? I don't even know what the woman says. So, I have to say that I want to make that very clear, but Brandon Biggs just delivers the hard things and it's not always easy standing on this side of the camera, and I appreciate your prayers. If you don't agree with what I say, pray for me. Please pray for me because I'm just as human as you are. And in that, I ask you to give me grace whenever I give a word across a camera that is very hard for me to even give. It takes a lot of courage to stand on this side and tell that there's going to be another Watergate and that JD Vance is going to be at the helm of it. It's not easy to say that. The Lord said it hasn't happened yet, but there's coming a day when JD Vance will—this would be very bad. And you must pray for this nation because if this would happen, it would derail something very bad. Something very bad would happen. And the Lord said, "You must pray for his heart, for he's not who he says he is in the future." Now, what would happen? Just like we saw Amy Coney Barrett, we all thought she was great and it was going to be awesome. But as she goes, the bitterness and the hardness of the position makes you change. If you're not word-based and you are not rooted and grounded in love, power and responsibility change you because your character wasn't there to handle it. To whom much is given, much is required. And if JD Vance got to be president, I saw a different man. What changes a man is pressure, but it was always there. It's like people say money ruins a man. No, the man was already ruined before he got the money. The money just magnified who he was. Does that make sense what I'm saying? It's not the money; it's the character of the man already. So that's what I'm trying to tell you all: I'm seeing these things. And then I saw, and then I heard, a Monica Lewinsky-Marilyn Monroe scandal, and then I heard "before a storm" and all these things. So, I just wanted to try to put this to rest to help you all. I know God has his hand on every single one of us and that if he can use me, he can use Candace. You all don't remember; nobody even knows me. But I want to say this: I may not have a huge platform like some of these people have, but I want to ask you this for the people who really got upset at me about Erica: If she was 350 lbs with a shaved head, would you still support her like you do? I mean, it's a hard question, but if she was 350 pounds and she'd come on there—some husbands get murdered all the time—but a lot of times we gravitate towards the beautiful, and because it's beautiful, it's perfect. But does it make it perfect? It just makes it human. But if she was a really good person on the inside, 350 pounds with a shaved head, would you still like her? It shows the body of Christ is blinded by stupid stuff. In my opinion, just because someone's pretty doesn't make them always good. Just because they're fat doesn't make them bad. You must follow with discernment of the spirit and be led by the spirit instead of by what you see with your carnal view. You're too moved by your eyes, ladies and gentlemen. There's a lot of you that do not have discernment at all. You must pray more and seek his face more. It's time to come up higher. And I'm not saying she's a bad person; I don't know her either. But it's amazing to me how quickly the body of Christ is a bandwagon person. And they go down the road of the pretty person, of the celebrity, of this, of that. And if you keep being led by your emotions and by your eyes, your eyes will deceive you in the days ahead. The Antichrist will look really polished and beautiful, and many people will follow him like that. He may look great and he'll have a great feeling, but how many people will surrender themselves to him just because he has a shiny thing? Don't follow the shiny thing just because they're beautiful, just because their eyes are pretty. Just because they might be a supermodel, I don't care what they look like. It's the heart of a man that I'm interested in, or the heart of a woman. Let's seek them. And you say, "Well, I see the heart." Do you? I question you. Do you see the heart? Well, yes, they cry on the stage and they say all these wonderful things. I don't care what you say; an actor says a lot, too. I love some good movies, but because they play the role doesn't mean they're always right. And you go, "Well, I saw Jim Caviezel and boy, he sure looked like Jesus in that movie," but I don't know Jim Caviezel outside of that set. But if I would walk up to him and go, "There's Jesus," that ain't Jesus. I try to paint a picture for you with words to make it more relatable because there's so many of you all that are blinded by so much, and the blind are leading the blind. And the more we get in these end times, if you're not rooted in the word of God and have a backbone like a crowbar, you're going to be swayed by a lot of stuff. The dark's going to get darker and the light is going to get lighter. You must find Jesus for yourself, not for something that's popular and trending. David again was popular and trending, but he was sleeping with Bathsheba and her husband was off to war. And when he didn't come home and lay down with her and get her pregnant to cover up David's sin, he was murdered. David thought he was doing right in his eyes by covering it up and trying to protect the platform, but David was wrong as all could be, and his baby died because of it. Do you know it's not always easy to be the one that gives the word? Not saying I'm trying to say Erica is a bad person; I don't know her. But you have to be smarter than this, folks. So, do they have any questions? And then I'll go on to Venezuela. I'm just saying mic drop. Mic drop is what somebody said. I prayed over this a lot. Somebody say anything we can pray for you to support you better. Any cure for the plague? There will be no cure for the plague. The only cure is Psalm 91 and Psalm 23. That's why he keeps telling you, you must know your authority for what's coming. They made it this way on purpose. And it will be intermingled with AI technology for high blood pressure, diabetic medicine, and cholesterol—things like that. And it will be made so that it's spliced somehow with major pharmaceutical drugs for a genocide from obesity. As the Lord has warned me so many times about my weight, genocide of obesity, that was the main plague. And the Lord said, "Watch it for people who are on medicine for it." And that's what the Lord said. And as I said, I'm not trying to call you to fear; I'm trying to call you to prayer. And as I have studied today, getting back vertical, because it's so easy to go horizontal on this and be worried about what everybody thinks or emails. You wouldn't believe the inundation of things. But as I sought the Father, I found him and I listened to his heart, and he said, "I'm pleased with you for delivering the hard things." And I told you as it goes, the days ahead, they will be proven to be accurate. Just stand where I've told you to stand and deliver the words that I've told you to deliver even when they're not popular with man. I told you to pray for Erica, pray for Candace. Do I think that it has to do with everything that Candace is saying? Heavens, no. Do I feel like she's off in some things? Yes, major red flags. After I hear some of these videos, I go, "Caution, there's some things here." But the Lord said it's going down the rabbit hole, but not all things down the rabbit hole. A conspiracy is a conspiracy. Whatever she's saying, there's facts to some of it. There's something to Charlie's death. Pray for that to be uncovered. There's more to it than just some transgender guy shooting somebody. There's more to this. And the Lord said, "You must not just look at it like this. Step away from the trees, ladies and gentlemen. You're too close. You're in the forest, but you don't see." And the Lord said, "There's more to this concerning this man's death." And people say, "Well, Brandon, I believe it just has to do with the transgender." No, it's deeper. There's something deeper. And the Lord said it's not for me to go down the rabbit hole. I don't care. My focus and my task is to keep telling you what's coming. I don't have time to go down the rabbit hole. Well, they're revolting against their government, and from what I understand, they're protesting and rioting and acting crazy down there. But that's what's happening right now in Mexico. Did anybody know that? And this is what I saw was corruption in their—you probably shouldn't play any more of that. You don't want to get your video flagged. But you see what's going on in Mexico today. And as we are praying and we're interceding for the nations, this is the seriousness of the hour. This is why I'm trying to tell you all about Venezuela and the uprising of sending in the military to overthrow the Venezuelan government. And the Lord showed me revival starting to break out. I saw a lot of people getting born again. I saw there was a lot of witchcraft in Venezuela. Can anybody confirm that? I don't know. But I saw a blackness, a haze upon the nation with a lot of occultic activity. And the Lord said he was bringing revival to Venezuela, that they have not been forgotten, that there will be a major revival in Venezuela, and it will go through South America. And South America will have an amazing move of God just like everybody else will. Most people, because we don't talk about it, think it was always about America, but God is going to visit Asia. God is going to visit South America. God is going to visit Africa. And you see all this turmoil and all this uprising right now. And the Lord is showing me just because you see all this, we're about to have a major breakthrough. We're about to have a major turnaround, and you're about to see a major revival with all these people breaking out and getting upset and all this stuff going on. Get ready for the church to arise in these areas and see a supernatural harvest for the kingdom of God. We must believe for this. That's why the Lord told me, 'I called you. We're here to pray and to pray for the nations.' I saw the Cold War getting colder and I saw Venezuela and Cuba and these nations all coming together to bring forth a greater, stronger BRICS. They would be offered a position, while the United States was basically trying to put their finger in it, saying, 'No, you're not going to do this,' because the dollar has to remain king. It was just very serious. So, we see this is what I'm trying to tell y'all. But we're going to have a major move of God in America. We will have a major move of God in these nations, in Mexico. And yeah, we have corrupt politicians. Yes, we see all these things. But I'm telling you, there's a lot of good people in these nations that just want a move of God, that are hungry and desperate and thirsty for a touch from Jesus. And that's why I'm trying to tell you, the Lord said, 'I'm going to visit and shake the Catholic Church.' Why? There's 1.4 billion Catholics. And there are a lot of people—like we had a young man, 11 years old, born and raised Catholic. He helps the priest with the sacraments. He gave his heart to Jesus Christ on the channel this week, yesterday or the day before. And his mother emailed us. She was so excited that her 11-year-old son said the sinner's prayer, but he's a volunteer at the Catholic church and is very involved there. She said he gave his heart to Jesus Christ watching your channel, 11 years old. And that's why we do this. I wept. I told D, she shared a picture of him and showed this little boy and how he gave his heart to Jesus Christ this week. And that's why we do this. It's for the little boy. We know that God is going to visit the youth in the Catholic church. That God is going to shake and he's going to awaken a major move of God in the Catholic community. And the same thing is what he said, 'I'm going to visit and I'm going to fix some false doctrine in the Mormon church.' And he said, 'There's a lot of false doctrine, but I'm going to visit.' I saw Jesus himself showing up to people in the Jehovah's Witness and Mormon faith. I know it's probably two different things, but I saw this: that there would be a move of God and that there would be a breaking off of the church and that they would split from it and start teaching the way they should about Jesus, versus the way the Mormon church is. I saw a splitting in the Mormon church. And the Lord said, 'There's a major revival going to take place in the Mormon church, Brandon. There's a lot of good people there that are just deceived in their doctrine, and I'm going to visit this church, and I'm going to set these people free. They've been taught wrong.' And he said, 'Brandon, I'm going to visit them. There's a lot of good people.' Most people go, 'Well, you know, no,' but I heard the spirit of the Lord. And he said, 'I'm going to visit and there's going to be revival and there'll be a splitting.' The church will be split. Some people will just keep going with the same old doctrine, but there'll be many that split off and go the other way. And it's the right way. But there'll be a major revival even in the Mormon church in these last days. He said, 'Brandon, I wish that none should perish but all come to repentance.' He said, 'I'm going to even visit the satanic church. Brandon, I don't even want the highest occultist witches and warlocks to go to hell, Brandon. Do you understand? I died for every single one of them not to go to hell.' I was like, 'Man, they serve the devil. They deserve to go to hell.' But he said, 'I don't want that any man should perish.' And I thought, 'Lord, you even love the Satanists with all your heart. You love them all. You look past all that they do and blasphemy against you, all the darkness they do to sacrifice and afflict the church and try to bring things down.' He said, 'I love them all.
